---
title: "Contact"
---

## Contact

- Email: `achakkit@purdue.edu`
- Office: ME 3179, School of Mechanical Engineering, Purdue University
- Location: West Lafayette, IN, USA

## Links

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=LssYeuUAAAAJ&hl=en)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5264-5247)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/athulcd)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/athulcd/)

<!-- ## Office Hours

Add office hours or a note about how you prefer to be contacted. -->
